Video.summary: Driven out of his pack, a young wolf has to face his fate alone and try to survive in a world ruled by man.
Video.title: A Wolf's Journey

Video.summary: Can animals develop their own health care strategies? Learn more in this humorous investigation.
Video.title: Animal Doctors

Video.summary: How to protect the last baboons of the Table Mountain region? Teach them to fear humans.
Video.title: Baboon Bandits

Video.summary: Explore Antarctica, one of the world's most beautiful, yet inhospitable, landscapes.
Video.title: Antarctica

Video.summary: The love story between chickens and men has lasted for over 5000 years.
Video.title: Chicken Planet

Video.summary: The orchard is a unique ecosystem. As seasons change, we experience the interplay of nature, man, and animal.
Video.title: Carousel of Life

Video.summary: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.
Video.title: Okavango: Water in the Desert

Video.summary: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it shows no sign of losing popularity with animals and people.
Video.title: Namibia: Sands of Time

Video.summary: Ngorongoro is a land full of wildlife, from proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.
Video.title: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire

Video.summary: Even the sky isn't safe. See how predator and prey react to each other in the evolutionary, aerial arms race.
Video.title: The Early Bird

Video.summary: See how their cold-blooded metabolisms have let reptiles cover the globe for hundreds of millions of years.
Video.title: Reptiles

Video.summary: See the ways some animals can defend themselves using fascinating tactics of deception and chemical warfare.
Video.title: Defenses

Video.summary: Raiders of the underwater world have evolved to become among the more efficient eating machines on our planet.
Video.title: Underwater Predators

Video.summary: See how ocean creatures have evolved hunting and hiding techniques to survive in their dangerous environment.
Video.title: Underwater Prey's Defenses

Video.summary: The race for survival is fierce for the earth's smallest creatures. See the winners among the insect world.
Video.title: The Race Underfoot

Video.summary: Living in darkness is another effective survival tactic. Here we see those animals who only come out at night.
Video.title: After Dark

Video.summary: This episode accompanies the polar bears during the ice-free, colorful summertime.
Video.title: A Summer With Polar Bears at Hudson Bay

Image.alt: A Summer With Polar Bears at Hudson Bay
A Summer With Polar Bears at Hudson Bay
A Summer With Polar Bears at Hudson Bay

Video.summary: During its brief summer, Hudson Bay offers ideal living conditions for numerous animals and plants.
Video.title: Summertime Wilderness

Video.summary: Stocking up energy and breeding are the major challenges for wild plants and animals that accompany spring.
Video.title: Season of New Beginnings

Video.summary: For wild animals in Central Europe, early springtime is time to gain energy and produce offspring.
Video.title: Time for Awakening

Video.summary: The traditional mixed orchard is a crucially important cultivated landscape, especially in fall and winter.
Video.title: Autumn and Winter

Video.summary: In spring and summer, the orchard meadow reveals an invaluable habitat for the local flora and fauna.
Video.title: Spring and Summer

Video.summary: This episode sets off on a tour in the winter wilderness of Central Europe to see how local animals survive.
Video.title: The Magic Wishing Table

Video.summary: This episode embarks on an exciting journey of discovery through the winter wilderness of Central Europe.
Video.title: Animal Survival Experts

Video.summary: In this episode, we examine how every animal has what could be called a sense of rhythm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Sense of Timing

Video.summary: While all life began in the oceans, human beings now rely on technology to navigate the seven seas.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Underwater

Video.summary: While all life began in the oceans, human beings now rely on technology to navigate the seven seas.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Sky

Video.summary: In this episode we find out more about the animals that live in the shadows.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Night

Video.summary: In this episode we find out more about the animals that have their feet firmly planted on or under the ground.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Earth
